description_long: This is a modern residential bungalow set within a spacious, landscaped lot featuring numerous trees and greenery. The main structure is a single-story building with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist architectural style. The property includes a driveway leading to a detached garage, and the house is surrounded by a mix of open lawn and dense clusters of trees. The front of the bungalow is defined by a clean, geometric facade with prominent window groupings and a paved entryway. The rear and sides of the property are bordered by additional vegetation and a privacy fence. The overall setting suggests a private, upscale suburban residence with ample outdoor space and contemporary design elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped lot featuring a driveway, detached garage, and abundant trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an angled aerial perspective, highlighting the driveway, detached garage, and the main house surrounded by trees and open lawn.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the bungalow from the front, emphasizing the entryway, symmetrical landscaping, and the prominent facade of the house.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the property from the rear, revealing the backyard area, privacy fence, and the arrangement of trees behind the house.
description_view_3: View 3 captures the side of the bungalow, focusing on the long driveway, garage, and the side elevation of the house with adjacent greenery.
